title: saino #4525
definition:
1) to wag the tail
    1a) of dogs
 2) metaph.
    2a) to flatter, fawn upon
    2b) to move (the mind of one)
        2b1) agreeably
        2b2) to agitate, disturb, trouble
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to wag the tail
    1a) of dogs
 2) metaph.
    2a) to flatter, fawn upon
    2b) to move (the mind of one)
        2b1) agreeably
        2b2) to agitate, disturb, trouble

    NASB:  to wag the tail, hence to greet, flatter, disturb:
